raw.message: 有名イラストレーターや声優陣が手掛けるキャラクターが多数登場

hook.summary: Energetic intro featuring the game logo and a call to online competition.
hook.visual_action: The game logo is centered over a teal and blue background while playing cards fly across the screen, transitioning to anime character art.
hook.text_overlay: 全国のプレイヤーとオンライン対戦可能！
hook.voiceover_transcript: 全国のプレイヤーとオンライン対戦可能！無料のテキサスホールデムアプリ、エムホールデム！

scene_flow: Intro animation with the game logo and cards flying, announcing online multiplayer capabilities.
Showcase of the main characters and the core 'Free Texas Hold'em' app value proposition.
Demonstration of the 'Lesson Mode' designed to help beginners learn the game mechanics.
Final montage of gameplay screens emphasizing the competitive 'Mind Sports' aspect of the title.
on_screen_text: 全国のプレイヤーとオンライン対戦可能！
無料のテキサスホールデムアプリ
初めての方にも安心のレッスンモードあり！
勝ち上がれ！究極のマインドスポーツ！
cta_text: 勝ち上がれ！究極のマインドスポーツ！
audience_proxy: Japanese mobile gamers and anime fans interested in competitive card games and Texas Hold'em.
